text: T-017 has been flagged for an arc-discharge gas signature in the last DGA. Confirm the fault classification from the on-file record, then pull the current RUL estimate and combine the two views into a recommendation on whether to schedule replacement now or operate to a planned outage window.
characteristic_form: The answer should confirm the DGA fault classification for T-017, report the current RUL estimate, and combine the two into a replace-now versus operate-to-window recommendation with a one-line rationale.
